title: geum × hortigenum
intro: Geum × hortigenum, also known as the Avens or Herb Bennet, is a hybrid species of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Geum × hortigenum include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as respiratory issues and skin problems.
